aboutUs.title: 关于我们
aboutUs.content:
农业领域长期存在信息断层、流程低效、数据孤岛等结构性问题。农化行业深陷结构性矛盾：农户缺乏专业指导，生产模式粗放，过度追求低价导致「劣币驱逐良币」；企业深陷价格战，应收高企，现金流岌岌可危。必须在行业层面建立可复用数字化基础设施，推动企业从「低效内卷」转向「价值驱动」，让优质产品和服务重获市场溢价。以农化企业为切口，20年行业经验为根基，构建贯通全产业链数字化方法论，推动系统性变革。项目由专职负责人主导：战略顾问把控产业方向，农化顾问提供行业经验；工程、架构、设计、数据与运维各领域专业人士负责执行落地。

Agriculture has long faced structural challenges: fragmented information flows, inefficient processes, and persistent data silos. The agro-chemical industry is mired in structural contradictions. Farmers lack professional guidance, production models remain extensive, and the race to the bottom on price drives out quality. Enterprises are trapped in price wars, receivables mount, and cash flows are severely compressed.

Reusable digital infrastructure must be established at the industry level, driving enterprises from destructive price competition toward value-driven growth, and restoring market premiums for quality products and services.

Starting with agro-chemical enterprises as the entry point, grounded in 20 years of industry practice, we have built a full-chain digital methodology to drive systematic, sector-wide transformation.

The project is led by a dedicated project director. Strategy advisors set the industry direction; agro-chemical consultants provide industry expertise; professionals across engineering, architecture, design, data, and operations are responsible for execution and delivery.

privacyPolicy.title: 隐私政策
privacyPolicy.content:
我们尊重并保护所有使用我们服务的用户的隐私。本隐私政策解释了我们如何收集、使用、披露和保护您的个人信息。 1. 信息收集：我们可能会收集您的姓名、电子邮件地址、电话号等个人信息。 2. 信息使用：我们使用收集的信息来提供和改进我们的服务，包括但不限于发送营销信息、处理订单和提供技术支持。 3. 信息共享：我们不会将您的个人信息出售或出租给第三方，除非得到您的明确同意或法律要求。 4. 信息保护：我们采取合理的安全措施来保护您的个人信息，防止未经授权的访问、使用或披露。 5. 您的权利：您有权访问、更正或删除您的个人信息。如果您有任何关于隐私的问题或疑虑，请联系我们。

We respect and protect the privacy of all users of our services. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and protect your personal information. 1. Information Collection: We may collect your name, email address, phone number, and other personal information. 2. Information Use: We use the information we collect to provide and improve our services, including but not limited to sending marketing messages, processing orders, and providing technical support. 3. Information Sharing: We will not sell or rent your personal information to third parties unless we have your explicit consent or are required by law. 4. Information Protection: We take reasonable security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, use, or disclosure. 5. Your Rights: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. If you have any questions or concerns about privacy, please contact us.
